sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89835" key="prosonomaste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσονομ-αστέον</orth>, <sense id="n89835.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must apply the name</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λάρκους τούτοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.111</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
